detectors.description:
Reentrancy in lockEtherPay.release() (lockEtherPay.sol#199-215):
	External calls:
	- token_amount = tokenBalance() (lockEtherPay.sol#207)
		- token_reward.balanceOf(this) (lockEtherPay.sol#167)
	- token_reward.transfer(beneficiary,token_amount) (lockEtherPay.sol#209)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- isReleased = true (lockEtherPay.sol#213)
	lockEtherPay.isReleased (lockEtherPay.sol#141) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- lockEtherPay.isReleased (lockEtherPay.sol#141)
	- lockEtherPay.release() (lockEtherPay.sol#199-215)

		- [token_reward.balanceOf(this)](lockEtherPay.sol#L167)
	- [token_reward.transfer(beneficiary,token_amount)](lockEtherPay.sol#L209)
	State variables written after the call(s):

	- [lockEtherPay.release()](lockEtherPay.sol#L199-L215)
